description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The front facade features large, horizontally-aligned windows and a single main door, with a covered carport on the left side sheltering a red car. The front yard includes a small pool, two green lounge chairs, a white gate, potted plants, and a low stone wall enclosing the area. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray, tiled pattern, giving the house a contemporary appearance. The rear and side walls are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The house is elevated with a ramp leading to the main entrance, and the landscaping is simple and functional.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a carport, and a landscaped front yard featuring a pool and lounge area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, carport with a red car, pool, lounge chairs, and landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid wall, carport roof, and partial view of the front yard features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly solid wall with minimal window openings and no visible entry points.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the carport, side of the house, and a glimpse of the front yard and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows on the front facade
attribute_entryway_design: Single main door accessed by a ramp, covered by a carport with a tiled roof, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
